evals.name: bounded-strategy-tree
evals.prompt: We maintain a developer CLI used by a small team. Should we build a public plugin marketplace this quarter? Budget is six engineer-weeks; security review capacity is limited. Brainstorm the decision and give one recommendation. Do not create files.
evals.expected_output: Builds a labelled tree, marks assumptions, prunes low-leverage branches, answers every leaf, synthesizes one recommendation, and performs no writes.
